---
title: "Services"
description: "Services and collaboration options."
---

## Services

Arturo's strengths are best aligned with customer-facing, sales, and project coordination work.

## Customer Service

- Needs assessment and solution matching
- Customer concern resolution
- Bilingual Spanish communication
- Clear follow-up and relationship support

## Sales Support

- Product education and recommendation
- Value-based selling conversations
- Customer confidence building
- CRM and documentation support

## Project Coordination

- Client and contractor communication
- Timeline and expectation alignment
- Cross-functional collaboration
- Organized handoff and status tracking
